title: Istanbul 29 May University 2017-2018 Graduation Ceremony
content:
Istanbul 29 May University 2017-2018 Graduation Ceremony

Istanbul 29 May University 2017-2018 Academic Year Alumni are making a living.

İstanbul The fifth graduation ceremony of 29 May University will be held at Bağlarbaşı Congress and Culture Center on 01 June 2018. In this ceremony, where our Faculty of Letters will be the fifth, International Islamic and Religious Studies Faculty will give its third graduates, our Faculty of Economics and Administrative Sciences will have the excitement of giving their first graduation.

Friday, June 01, 2018 at 17:00
